series_metadata.series_description: Records contain information such as the case number, name of the case, address of the case, notices of hearings that are set, and the date any decisions were made. This record series includes, but is not limited to, the Board of Building Appeals'' journal.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: If the paper copy is imaged and indexed into a machine readable format for retention, then upon confirmation that the paper copy was imaged and indexed into a machine readable format, the paper copy shall be destroyed two years after being imaged and indexed. If the paper copy is not imaged and indexed into a machine readable format for retention, then the record shall be retained permanently., Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Recycle
